text.div:
Expansion performed internally based on codesystem PH Core Disability Type Code System v0.1.1 (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 9 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  visualVisual DisabilityComplete or partial loss of sight/visual function.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  hearingHearing DisabilityComplete or partial loss of hearing/hearing function.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  speechSpeech ImpairmentComplete or partial loss of speech or communication function.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  physicalPhysical/Orthopedic DisabilityImpairment in physical/orthopedic function including locomotor disabilities.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  intellectualIntellectual DisabilitySignificant limitations in intellectual functioning and adaptive behavior.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  learningLearning DisabilityNeurological disorders affecting acquisition and use of listening, speaking, reading, writing, reasoning, or mathematical abilities.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  psychosocialPsychosocial DisabilityMental health conditions and psychosocial impairments.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  visual-low-visionLow VisionSignificant visual impairment not correctable by standard glasses/contact lenses.
https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/CodeSystem/ph-core-disability-type-cs  visual-blindnessBlindnessComplete loss of vision or light perception.
